v0.1.0.description:
**This is the very first release!**

This version contains the groundwork for an Archipelago implementation for Phoenotopia: Awakening. The randomizer currently includes:

- Free standing items
- Chests
- Destructables with loot or rin
- Enemies hiding key items (including fish)
- Gifts from NPCs
- Shop items
- Lizard drops

in:
- Panselo
- The overworld surrounding Panselo (Sunflower road and the cave towards the bridge are not included yet)
- Doki Forest
- Anuri Temple

The community will be my testing crew. If you encounter any issues, please refer to the Archipelago/Multiworld Game Information page and report an issue through one of the following channels:
1. File an issue at the repository on [Github](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/issues)
2. Describe your issue in the game thread on the official AP discord.
3. Post it in the mwgg-support channel in the [ZeldaSpeedRuns Discord](https://discord.com/invite/zsr)
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

v0.1.1.description:
**Minor update:**

Changelog:
- Fixed bug that made money checks on Sarcophagus check drop infinite money without clearing the check
- Hyperlink fix on game setup page
v0.1.1.title: v0.1.1

v0.2.0.description:
0.2 is here!

While this release doesn't add any new areas to the game, it adds quite some features needed to expand to a healthy randomizer with all item locations included.

New features:

- **Story management & Timewarps**: Once you defeat the Slargummy boss, Panselo will turn into its post-abduction state. If you ever need to go back to pre-abduction Panselo to get some checks you've missed, You can talk to the Zophiel statue and temporarily go back in time. - **All items** that are needed to get you to the end of the game are now included in the item pool! That means all tools, upgraded tools and weapons. Even with the limited amount of checks, it makes for a more interesting randomizer experience. - **Complete logic overhaul**: Though less noticeable for you as a player, the entire logic model now includes all the possibly necessary items and on a technical level, it's way easier to expand to the entire game. - **Batless start**: You can now start the game without the wooden bat and have it randomized in the item pool. This includes an option to open the Panselo gates by default, which prevents you from possibly getting BKed early in a multiworld. - **Upgradable items**: Bats, tools and the spear now have separate options to be upgradable. This means that you will always find the Slingshot before the Treble shot. The Wooden bat always before the Composite bat. And for the spear, this means you will always find the Sonic spear before the Spear bomb. - **Options to exclude (almost) every possible check**: Locations for key items, heart rubies, energy gems and moonstones can now be excluded. If you do, you have a separate option to still include these items in the item pool and have these locations filled with a filler item (Excluded key item locations will always work like this), or to exclude the items from the item pool and have them stay at their vanilla location. For now, Anuri pearlstone locations can't be excluded yet due to a feature I wish to work on for the next release. - **Infinite Lunar Artifacts**: A change some might wish to be in vanilla. Lunar artifacts will no longer take up a spot in the inventory and can't be discarded. They can still be recycled for now, but once Astrid's rewards are included, this will also be disabled. - **Several new checks**: Most notably the checks in post-abduction Panselo. Also some checks I missed in the previous release and checks that couldn't be reached with the item pool of the previous release. Once again, the community will be my testing crew. If you encounter any issues during your run, please let me know through one of the following ways: 1. File an issue at the repository on [GitHub](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/issues). 2. Describe your issue in the game thread on the official AP discord. 3. Post it in the mwgg-support channel in the [Unofficial AP Discord](https://discord.multiworld.gg)
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0

0.2 is here!

While this release doesn't add any new areas to the game, it adds quite some features needed to expand to a healthy randomizer with all item locations included.

New features:

- **Story management & Timewarps**: Once you defeat the Slargummy boss, Panselo will turn into its post-abduction state. If you ever need to go back to pre-abduction Panselo to get some checks you've missed, You can talk to the Zophiel statue and temporarily go back in time. - **All items** that are needed to get you to the end of the game are now included in the item pool! That means all tools, upgraded tools and weapons. Even with the limited amount of checks, it makes for a more interesting randomizer experience. - **Complete logic overhaul**: Though less noticeable for you as a player, the entire logic model now includes all the possibly necessary items and on a technical level, it's way easier to expand to the entire game. - **Batless start**: You can now start the game without the wooden bat and have it randomized in the item pool. This includes an option to open the Panselo gates by default, which prevents you from possibly getting BKed early in a multiworld. - **Upgradable items**: Bats, tools and the spear now have separate options to be upgradable. This means that you will always find the Slingshot before the Treble shot. The Wooden bat always before the Composite bat. And for the spear, this means you will always find the Sonic spear before the Spear bomb. - **Options to exclude (almost) every possible check**: Locations for key items, heart rubies, energy gems and moonstones can now be excluded. If you do, you have a separate option to still include these items in the item pool and have these locations filled with a filler item (Excluded key item locations will always work like this), or to exclude the items from the item pool and have them stay at their vanilla location. For now, Anuri pearlstone locations can't be excluded yet due to a feature I wish to work on for the next release. - **Infinite Lunar Artifacts**: A change some might wish to be in vanilla. Lunar artifacts will no longer take up a spot in the inventory and can't be discarded. They can still be recycled for now, but once Astrid's rewards are included, this will also be disabled. - **Several new checks**: Most notably the checks in post-abduction Panselo. Also some checks I missed in the previous release and checks that couldn't be reached with the item pool of the previous release. Once again, the community will be my testing crew. If you encounter any issues during your run, please let me know through one of the following ways: 1. v0.2.0r2.title: v0.2.0

v0.2.1.description:
Minor release - 0.2.1

Minor patch to fix several generation errors and some bugs.

Changes:

- **Several generation errors fixed**: Some yaml setting combinations caused generation to fail. These are now fixed. If you find more, please report them to me! - **New fishing check**: Added the fish in the Anuri Temple pond as a location under 'Fishing spots'. - **Prelude of Panselo is now correctly handled when its location is excluded**: With NPC gifts disabled and 'keep key items in item pool' enabled, it was possible to get the item twice. Once from the item pool and once at its vanilla location. Now you can only get it from the item pool. - **Logic refinement**: Some checks within non-liftable breakable objects now require you to have something to break them. Full patch notes of 0.2.0 can be found [here](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/releases/tag/v0.2.0). If you encounter any issues while playing, please let me know!
v0.2.1.title: v0.2.1

v0.2.1r2.title: v0.2.1

v0.3.0.description:
0.3 is here!

It took a little longer than I expected, but the project is finally ready for a new release.

New features:

- **Almost 200 new checks**: Sunflower Road, the kingdom bridges, the Atai region, Sand Drifts and the Ouroboros Hideout are now included as locations, setting the total check count at 274. The new goal of your run is to defeat Birdy and the giant sand drake boss. Anything beyond that point in the story is the new out of bounds border for checks you can get. Special thanks to @ET_is_here for helping me with the logic here! - **Redistribution of checks among settings**: A lot of checks were about to fall under miscellaneous so I redid the distribution of settings. New settings include items in breakable objects, freestanding items, sidequests, minigames, trapchest, Ouroboros shrines, perro locations and the ancient vault. - **Spell of Rejuvenation / Progressive Prelude of Panselo**: With the Spell of Rejuvenation now in the item pool, you will now have the option to either get them progressively or separately. Doesn't make a difference with the current location pool, but the choice is yours. - **No more waiting while saving**: You will no longer have to stand still for 3 seconds when you save at a savepoint. I hope this will lower the bar of effort to go for a save. The waiting time was only for immersion anyway. - **Complete rework on NPC check handling**: You won't notice a thing, but I sure will. The way I implemented the handling for NPC checks was unsustainable for the rest of the game and I had to redo it entirely. It's cleaner and will save me many hours when adding the rest of the locations to the game. Aside from this, a lot of work was done under the hood to make the project more expandable. Like always, the community will be my testing crew. If you encounter any issues during your run, please let me know through one of the following ways: 1. File an issue at the repository on [GitHub](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/issues). 2. Describe your issue in the game thread on the [official AP discord](https://discord.com/invite/8Z65BR2). 3. Post it in the mwgg-support channel in the [Unofficial AP Discord](https://discord.multiworld.gg).

Known issues:

- After buying one item from the Atai bartender, the text for the other item will go back to the vanilla text as well. This is only visual so you can still buy the other item. - Taking the water route from the Metro area to the left side of the Atai sewer with rocket boots and without the lifesaver will cause you to infinitely drown.
v0.3.0.title: v0.3.0

v0.3.1.description:
Bug fix patch - 0.3.1

Minor patch to fix a couple of bugs.

Bug fixes:

- Fixed crash when walking into the shooting gallery in Atai with the minigames setting disabled. - "Sand Drifts - Stealer bird plains floor patch" check will no longer give you the item twice. Full patch notes of 0.3 can be found [here](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/releases/tag/v0.3.0)
v0.3.1.title: v0.3.1
